events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes improper fitting direction - using a vent tee on its back for drainage. This is a non-compliant installation. IPC 704 covers drainage fittings and requires proper fitting usage. A vent tee used on its back for drainage would not provide proper drainage flow and violates code requirements for drainage fitting direction.

Decision: fail
Risk: medium (improper drainage can cause backups)
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
